name: Spam Fettuccini Primavera
recipeIngredient: 1 can SPAM Luncheon Meat, cut into julienne strips (12 oz)
1 package Frozen broccoli, carrot and cauliflower combination,
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, melt the butter.
2. Stir in the flour. Cook and stir for 1 minute.
3. Stir in the milk, chicken broth, and basil.
4. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly, until thickened; keep warm.
5. In a 5-quart saucepan, cook the fettuccini according to package directions; drain and return to saucepan.
6. Stir in the SPAM, vegetables, and sauce.
7. Cook and stir over medium-high heat until thoroughly heated.
8. Stir in the Parmesan cheese.
